'''ngazhala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foehood|foehood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foehood|foehood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngazhala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæzhælæth|ngæzhælæth]] || [[word:ngæzhælæj|ngæzhælæj]] || [[word:ngæzhælæsh|ngæzhælæsh]] || [[word:ngæzhælæ|ngæzhælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngazhazhalath|ngazhazhalath]] || [[word:ngazhazhalaj|ngazhazhalaj]] || [[word:ngazhazhalash|ngazhazhalash]] || [[word:ngazhazhala|ngazhazhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngazhalath|ngazhalath]] || [[word:ngazhalaj|ngazhalaj]] || [[word:ngazhalash|ngazhalash]] || [[word:ngazhala|ngazhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngazhaflath|ngazhaflath]] || [[word:ngazhaflaj|ngazhaflaj]] || [[word:ngazhaflash|ngazhaflash]] || [[word:ngazhaflaf|ngazhaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngazhalatha|ngazhalatha]] || [[word:ngazhalaja|ngazhalaja]] || [[word:ngazhalasha|ngazhalasha]] || [[word:ngazhalaka|ngazhalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngazhalath|ngazhalath]] || [[word:ngazhalaj|ngazhalaj]] || [[word:ngazhalash|ngazhalash]] || [[word:ngazhala|ngazhala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngazhalathal|ngazhalathal]] || [[word:ngazhalajal|ngazhalajal]] || [[word:ngazhalashal|ngazhalashal]] || [[word:ngazhalakal|ngazhalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngazhalathatha|ngazhalathatha]] || [[word:ngazhalajaja|ngazhalajaja]] || [[word:ngazhalashasha|ngazhalashasha]] || [[word:ngazhalaka|ngazhalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngazhalathan|ngazhalathan]] || [[word:ngazhalajan|ngazhalajan]] || [[word:ngazhalashan|ngazhalashan]] || [[word:ngazhalakan|ngazhalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngazhalathaoro|ngazhalathaoro]] || [[word:ngazhalajaoro|ngazhalajaoro]] || [[word:ngazhalashaoro|ngazhalashaoro]] || [[word:ngazhalakaoro|ngazhalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
